project.name: elden-ring-map
project.intent: Offline-capable interactive Elden Ring map (markers, questlines, browser-local progress), deployed as a static GitHub Pages site.

projection.description: Master-tile pixel projection. The web app (index.html CONFIG + xy()) AND the PowerShell build scripts (OFFSET_X/OFFSET_Y, native zoom) must use these identical constants. If they drift, every pin misaligns from the tiles. This symbol is the single source of truth for the projection math; change app and build scripts in lock-step.

data_source.description: Datamined upstream repo the build scripts pull marker/quest/item data and tiles from. Changing repo or branch means re-validating projection constants and category mappings against the new data.

deployment.description: Static hosting target. The deploy is a dumb file server (GitHub Pages), so the committed tiles + generated data must already match the projection the app expects. Tiles are pre-rendered at the projection's native zoom.
